name: OpenAI Apps
description: Bundle-owned MCP bridge for exposing OpenAI apps in OpenClaw.

interface.shortDescription: Expose OpenAI app connectors to OpenClaw through a bundle-owned MCP bridge
interface.longDescription: Runs the OpenAI apps bridge as a Codex-compatible MCP bundle so OpenClaw can publish and invoke enabled OpenAI app connectors from a bundle-owned app-server runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenAI Apps to inspect and invoke enabled OpenAI app connectors for this workspace
